name: fluentcart-mcp
description: 200+ tools for managing your FluentCart store — orders, products, customers, subscriptions, coupons, reports.

store_url.title: WordPress URL
store_url.description: Full URL to your WordPress site (e.g. https://your-store.com)

username.title: WordPress Username
username.description: Admin username with REST API access

app_password.title: Application Password
app_password.description: Generate at WordPress Admin > Users > Your Profile > Application Passwords

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of subscriptions with optional filtering. Returns subscription summaries with status, billing interval, and amounts. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents). Statuses: active, trialing, paused, intended, failing, past_due, expiring, canceled, expired, completed.

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific subscription including billing dates, gateway info, and payment history. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents). Statuses: active, trialing, paused, intended, failing, past_due, expiring, canceled, expired, completed.

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a subscription associated with an order. Can cancel immediately or at end of billing period. Side effect: may trigger refund depending on gateway and cancel_immediately flag.

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and synchronise subscription data from the payment gateway. Use when subscription state may be out of sync with the gateway (e.g. after manual gateway changes).

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_pause
tools.description: Pause an active subscription. Optionally set a date to auto-resume. Only active subscriptions can be paused.

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_reactivate
tools.description: Reactivate a cancelled or expired subscription. Creates a new billing cycle from the reactivation date.

tools.name: fluentcart_subscription_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused subscription. Only paused subscriptions can be resumed.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of coupons with optional search. Returns coupon code, type, value, status, and usage stats. Types: percentage, fixed, free_shipping. Statuses: active, inactive. Monetary values (minimum_amount, maximum_amount, fixed value) in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_create
tools.description: Create a new coupon. For fixed-type coupons, value is in smallest currency unit (cents). For percentage-type, value is the percentage (e.g. 15 = 15% off). Types: percentage, fixed, free_shipping.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific coupon including usage stats and eligibility rules.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_update
tools.description: Update an existing coupon. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents). Types: percentage, fixed, free_shipping.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a coupon. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_list_alt
tools.description: Alternative endpoint for listing all coupons in a simplified format.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_apply
tools.description: Apply a coupon to an order. Validates eligibility before applying. Side effect: recalculates order totals with the discount.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_cancel
tools.description: Remove an applied coupon from an order. Side effect: recalculates order totals without the discount.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_reapply
tools.description: Re-apply a previously cancelled coupon to an order. Side effect: recalculates order totals with the discount.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_check_eligibility
tools.description: Check whether a specific product is eligible for a coupon.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_settings_get
tools.description: Retrieve global coupon settings for the store.

tools.name: fluentcart_coupon_settings_save
tools.description: Save global coupon settings for the store.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with optional filtering. Returns order summaries with customer info, payment status, and totals. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents). Statuses: pending, processing, completed, canceled. Payment statuses: pending, paid, partially_refunded, refunded, failed.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_create
tools.description: Create a new order with items and customer information. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_order_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed order information including items, transactions, addresses, activities, and customer data. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_order_update
tools.description: Update an existing order. Subscription orders cannot be edited. Completed orders cannot have their status updated.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_delete
tools.description: Delete an order (soft delete). This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_mark_paid
tools.description: Mark an order as paid manually. Side effect: triggers order paid hooks and integration feeds.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_refund
tools.description: Process a refund for an order. Amount in smallest currency unit (cents). Side effect: sends refund to payment gateway if applicable.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_update_statuses
tools.description: Update payment, shipping, and order statuses independently. Payment: pending, paid, partially_refunded, refunded, failed. Shipping: pending, shipped, delivered, returned, unshipped.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_sync_statuses
tools.description: Synchronise order statuses with the payment gateway.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_change_customer
tools.description: Change the customer associated with an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_create_and_change_customer
tools.description: Create a new customer and associate them with the order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_update_address_id
tools.description: Update the address ID associated with an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_update_address
tools.description: Update a billing or shipping address on an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_create_custom
tools.description: Create a custom order line item on an existing order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_generate_licenses
tools.description: Generate any missing licenses for digital products in an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_transactions
tools.description: Retrieve all transactions for a specific order. Transaction types: charge, refund. Statuses: succeeded, pending, failed, refunded, disputed.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_transaction_get
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific transaction on an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_transaction_update_status
tools.description: Update the status of a specific transaction. Statuses: succeeded, pending, failed, refunded, disputed.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_accept_dispute
tools.description: Accept a dispute for a transaction. Side effect: may trigger refund.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bulk_action
tools.description: Perform bulk actions on multiple orders. Actions: update_status, delete, export.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_calculate_shipping
tools.description: Calculate shipping costs for an order based on items and shipping address.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_shipping_methods
tools.description: Retrieve available shipping methods for order creation.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_customer_orders
tools.description: Retrieve paginated orders for a specific customer with filtering. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with optional filtering. Returns customer summary with name, email, order count, and total spend. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_create
tools.description: Create a new customer record. Email is required and must be unique.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed customer information including addresses, labels, and stats. LTV and monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_update
tools.description: Update an existing customer profile.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_update_additional_info
tools.description: Update custom metadata fields on a customer record.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_orders_simple
tools.description: Retrieve customer orders in a simplified format.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_stats
tools.description: Retrieve statistics for a customer including order count and total spend. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_recalculate_ltv
tools.description: Recalculate the lifetime value for a customer. LTV is stored in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_addresses
tools.description: Retrieve all billing and shipping addresses for a customer.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_select
tools.description: Retrieve address options for the customer address selector dropdown.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_create
tools.description: Create a new billing or shipping address for a customer.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_add
tools.description: Alternative endpoint to add a new address to a customer.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_update
tools.description: Update an existing customer address.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_delete
tools.description: Delete a customer address. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_address_make_primary
tools.description: Set an address as the primary address for a customer.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_attachable_users
tools.description: Retrieve WordPress users that can be attached to customer records.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_attach_user
tools.description: Attach a WordPress user account to a customer record.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_detach_user
tools.description: Detach the linked WordPress user from a customer record.

tools.name: fluentcart_customer_bulk_action
tools.description: Perform bulk actions on multiple customers. Actions: update_status, delete, export.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional filtering. Returns product summaries with title, status, type, and price. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents). Types: simple, variable, subscription. Views: all, published, draft, trashed.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_create
tools.description: Create a new product. Defaults to draft status. Set fulfillment_type in detail object: digital or physical.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed product information including pricing, media, and detail metadata. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_delete
tools.description: Delete a product. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_duplicate
tools.description: Create a duplicate copy of an existing product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_bulk_action
tools.description: Perform bulk actions on multiple products.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_update_detail
tools.description: Update a product detail record (fulfillment type, stock settings, etc.).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_search_by_name
tools.description: Search for products by name. Returns matching products.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_search_variant_by_name
tools.description: Search for product variants by name.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_search_variant_options
tools.description: Search for product variant options (attribute combinations).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_suggest_sku
tools.description: Generate a suggested SKU based on a product title.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_fetch_by_ids
tools.description: Retrieve multiple products by their IDs in a single request.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_find_subscription_variants
tools.description: Find product variants that support subscription billing.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_pricing_get
tools.description: Retrieve pricing information for a product. All prices in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_pricing_update
tools.description: Update pricing for a product. Prices must be in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_pricing_widgets
tools.description: Retrieve pricing widgets and display components for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_related
tools.description: Retrieve related products for cross-sell and upsell.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_bundle_info
tools.description: Retrieve bundle information for a bundled product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_bundle_save
tools.description: Save bundle configuration for a product variation.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_tax_class_update
tools.description: Assign a tax class to a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_tax_class_remove
tools.description: Remove the tax class assignment from a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_shipping_class_update
tools.description: Assign a shipping class to a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_shipping_class_remove
tools.description: Remove the shipping class assignment from a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_manage_stock_update
tools.description: Enable or disable stock management for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_inventory_update
tools.description: Update inventory quantity for a specific product variant.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_sync_downloadable_files
tools.description: Synchronise downloadable files for a digital product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_downloadable_update
tools.description: Update a downloadable file record.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_downloadable_delete
tools.description: Delete a downloadable file from a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_downloadable_url
tools.description: Retrieve the download URL for a downloadable file.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_upgrade_settings
tools.description: Retrieve upgrade path settings for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_upgrade_path_save
tools.description: Create a new upgrade path setting for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_upgrade_path_update
tools.description: Update an existing upgrade path.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_upgrade_path_delete
tools.description: Delete an upgrade path.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_terms
tools.description: Retrieve product terms (categories, tags) list.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_terms_by_parent
tools.description: Retrieve product terms filtered by parent term.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_terms_add
tools.description: Add terms (categories, tags) to a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_taxonomy_sync
tools.description: Synchronise taxonomy terms for a product (replaces existing).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_taxonomy_delete
tools.description: Delete taxonomy terms from a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_integrations
tools.description: Retrieve integration feeds configured for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_integration_settings
tools.description: Retrieve settings for a specific integration on a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_integration_save
tools.description: Save an integration feed for a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_integration_delete
tools.description: Delete an integration feed from a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_product_integration_feed_status
tools.description: Enable or disable an integration feed on a product.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_list_all
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all product variants across all products.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of product variations with optional product filtering.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_create
tools.description: Create a new product variation. Price in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_update
tools.description: Update an existing product variation.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_delete
tools.description: Delete a product variation. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_set_media
tools.description: Set the media (image) for a product variation.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_pricing_table_update
tools.description: Update the pricing table for a product variation. Prices in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_product_variant_option_update
tools.description: Update a product variant option (attribute configuration).

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_fetch_by_ids
tools.description: Retrieve multiple variations by their IDs in a single request.

tools.name: fluentcart_variant_upgrade_paths
tools.description: Retrieve upgrade paths for a specific variation.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_overview
tools.description: High-level financial overview: gross/net revenue by month and quarter with YoY growth, plus top countries. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_summary
tools.description: Summarised report overview for the reports dashboard page.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_meta
tools.description: Report metadata: available date ranges, filter options, and configuration.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_dashboard_stats
tools.description: Key dashboard stats: total orders, paid orders, paid order items, and total paid amounts with comparison data. Amounts in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_revenue
tools.description: Revenue data grouped by day/week/month: net revenue, shipping, tax, refunds, order counts. Includes period comparison and fluctuations. Values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_revenue_by_group
tools.description: Revenue segmented by product group or category. Values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_sales
tools.description: Comprehensive sales report for a date range.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_sales_growth
tools.description: Sales growth metrics over time for a date range.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_sales_growth_chart
tools.description: Sales growth chart data with periodic comparisons, grouped by interval.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_order_chart
tools.description: Order chart data: gross sales, net revenue, order/item counts, averages grouped by date. Supports period comparison. Values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_orders_by_group
tools.description: Order data grouped by a dimension (e.g. payment method, product type).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_quick_order_stats
tools.description: Quick order statistics for a given lookback period.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_recent_orders
tools.description: Most recent orders for the dashboard widget.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_unfulfilled_orders
tools.description: Orders that have not yet been fulfilled or shipped.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_dashboard_summary
tools.description: Summary of key metrics for the main dashboard view.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_recent_activities
tools.description: Most recent activity log entries for the dashboard.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_product
tools.description: Retrieve a comprehensive product performance report with sales data. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_product_performance
tools.description: Retrieve individual product performance metrics including conversion rates and revenue trends. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents). Optionally filter by product ID.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_top_products_sold
tools.description: Retrieve the top-selling products ranked by total units sold. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_top_sold_products
tools.description: Retrieve top-selling products with revenue and quantity data. Alternative ranking to top-products-sold. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_top_sold_variants
tools.description: Retrieve top-selling product variants with revenue and quantity data. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_customer
tools.description: Retrieve customer analytics including acquisition, lifetime value, and activity metrics. Monetary values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_new_vs_returning
tools.description: Retrieve analytics comparing new customer orders against returning customer orders over a date range.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_daily_signups
tools.description: Retrieve daily customer signup counts over a date range.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_repeat_customers
tools.description: Search and retrieve customers who have made multiple purchases. Supports pagination.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_refund_chart
tools.description: Retrieve refund data over time for charting, including refund amounts and counts. Refund amounts in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_refund_by_group
tools.description: Retrieve refund data segmented by grouping dimension. Refund amounts in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_subscription_chart
tools.description: Retrieve subscription metrics over time including new subscriptions, renewals, and churn.

tools.name: fluentcart_report_future_renewals
tools.description: Retrieve upcoming subscription renewal dates and expected revenue. Revenue values in smallest currency unit (cents).

tools.name: fluentcart_report_license_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a summary of license statistics including total issued, active, expired, and revoked.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bump_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of order bump configurations. Returns bump summaries with title, status, and associated product variant. Statuses: active, draft.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bump_get
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order bump including its config, discount settings, display conditions, and associated product variant.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bump_create
tools.description: Create a new order bump configuration. Requires a title and a product variation ID (src_object_id) for the promotional product. Returns the created bump with its new ID.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bump_update
tools.description: Update an existing order bump configuration. Only provided fields are changed. Use this to modify title, description, status, discount, conditions, or priority.

tools.name: fluentcart_order_bump_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an order bump configuration. This cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_group_list
tools.description: Retrieve all product attribute groups (e.g. Size, Color). Returns group ID, title, slug, and associated terms.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_group_get
tools.description: Retrieve a specific attribute group by ID, including its terms.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_group_create
tools.description: Create a new product attribute group. Groups define option categories like Size, Color, or Material.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_group_update
tools.description: Update an existing attribute group title or slug.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_group_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an attribute group and all its terms. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_term_list
tools.description: Retrieve all terms for a specific attribute group. For example, terms "Small", "Medium", "Large" under the "Size" group.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_term_create
tools.description: Create a new term within an attribute group. For example, add "Red" to the "Color" group.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_term_update
tools.description: Update an existing attribute term title or slug.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_term_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an attribute term. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_attribute_term_reorder
tools.description: Update the sort order (serial) of an attribute term within its group. Lower numbers appear first.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_list_addons
tools.description: Retrieve all available integration addons and their status. Returns addon metadata including name, description, logo, category, whether the required plugin is installed, and current configuration status.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_global_settings
tools.description: Retrieve global settings for a specific integration by its settings key. Returns current configuration values and field definitions (type, label, tips). Field types: text, password, select, link, authenticate-button.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_save_global_settings
tools.description: Update global settings for a specific integration. Pass settings_key plus integration-specific fields as top-level properties. Field names vary per integration -- use get_global_settings first to discover them.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_global_feeds
tools.description: Retrieve all global-level integration feeds. Global feeds run on order-level events (e.g. order_paid_done, order_refunded) unlike product feeds which are scoped to specific products.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_feed_settings
tools.description: Retrieve settings and field definitions for a specific integration feed. Pass integration_name to get a blank template for creating a new feed, or additionally pass integration_id to load an existing feed for editing.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_save_feed_settings
tools.description: Create or update an integration feed configuration. Use get_feed_settings first to discover available fields for the integration provider. Include integration_id in the body to update an existing feed, omit to create new.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_change_feed_status
tools.description: Enable or disable a global integration feed without modifying its settings.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_delete_feed
tools.description: Permanently delete a global integration feed. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_feed_lists
tools.description: Retrieve available lists for a specific integration provider. Returns mailing lists, contact groups, tags, or similar collections depending on the provider (e.g. FluentCRM lists, Mailchimp audiences).

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_dynamic_options
tools.description: Retrieve dynamic select options for integration feed fields. Used when a feed field depends on a remote data source (e.g. fetching CRM tags, membership levels, or course lists).

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_get_chained_data
tools.description: Retrieve chained/dependent data for integration feed fields. Used when selecting a value in one field determines the options in another (e.g. selecting a list then loading its fields or segments).

tools.name: fluentcart_integration_install_plugin
tools.description: Install a required integration plugin from WordPress.org. Requires super admin permissions. Use list_addons first to find the addon_key.

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_get_store
tools.description: Retrieve store configuration settings including currency, address, checkout options, page assignments (checkout, cart, receipt, shop), button texts, and order mode (test/live).

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_save_store
tools.description: Update store configuration settings. Accepts any key-value pairs from getStoreSettings (e.g. store_name, currency, order_mode, checkout page IDs, button texts). Only provided keys are updated; omitted keys remain unchanged.

tools.name: fluentcart_payment_get_all
tools.description: Retrieve all available payment methods with their status and configuration. Returns both active and inactive gateways (Stripe, PayPal, manual, etc.).

tools.name: fluentcart_payment_get_settings
tools.description: Retrieve settings for a specific payment method by its key. Returns method-specific configuration fields and current values.

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_get_modules
tools.description: Retrieve module configuration including available modules (Turnstile, Stock Management, Licensing, Order Bump) and their activation status.

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_get_permissions
tools.description: Retrieve available WordPress roles and currently configured capability permissions for FluentCart access control. Returns role names, keys, and capability flags.

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_save_permissions
tools.description: Update capability-based permission assignments for WordPress roles. Replaces the full capability list; omitted capabilities are removed.

tools.name: fluentcart_settings_get_confirmation_shortcodes
tools.description: Retrieve available shortcodes for use in the order confirmation page template. Returns placeholder tokens that can be inserted into confirmation content.

tools.name: fluentcart_label_list
tools.description: Retrieve all available labels for organising orders, customers, and other entities. Returns label ID, text value, colour hex code, and timestamps.

tools.name: fluentcart_label_create
tools.description: Create a new label for tagging orders, customers, etc.

tools.name: fluentcart_label_update_selections
tools.description: Update which labels are assigned to a specific entity. Replaces all current label assignments with the provided list.

tools.name: fluentcart_activity_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of activity log entries. Supports filtering by log type, module name, and module ID. Returns audit trail of actions performed in the store.

tools.name: fluentcart_activity_delete
tools.description: Delete a specific activity log entry. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: fluentcart_activity_mark_read
tools.description: Update the read status of an activity log entry. Can mark as either read or unread.

tools.name: fluentcart_note_attach
tools.description: Attach or update a note on an order. Use for adding admin comments, internal memos, or status updates to an order.

tools.name: fluentcart_dashboard_onboarding
tools.description: Retrieve the store onboarding/setup wizard status. Returns which setup steps have been completed and how many remain.

tools.name: fluentcart_dashboard_overview
tools.description: Retrieve dashboard overview including product count, order count, revenue, and refund totals. Monetary values are in the smallest currency unit (cents) when has_currency is true.

tools.name: fluentcart_app_init
tools.description: Retrieve full application bootstrap data including translations, shop config, REST config, and asset URLs. Use to validate the connection and inspect store configuration.

tools.name: fluentcart_app_get_attachments
tools.description: Retrieve WordPress media library attachments available to FluentCart.

tools.name: fluentcart_app_upload_attachment
tools.description: Upload a media attachment to the WordPress media library via FluentCart. Note: the underlying API expects multipart/form-data; this tool sends JSON which may have limited support. For binary uploads, use the WP media uploader directly.

tools.name: fluentcart_app_get_widgets
tools.description: Retrieve dashboard widget data for the FluentCart admin panel. Optionally filter by widget type or request specific data.

tools.name: fluentcart_public_product_views
tools.description: Retrieve product view data for the storefront. No authentication required. Returns publicly visible product information for frontend display.

tools.name: fluentcart_public_product_search
tools.description: Search published products by name. No authentication required. Returns matching products visible on the storefront.

tools.name: fluentcart_public_products
tools.description: Retrieve publicly available products. No authentication required. Returns the full public product catalogue for storefront display.

tools.name: fluentcart_public_user_login
tools.description: Frontend login endpoint. Authenticates a user by email and password, returning customer data with an authentication token.

tools.name: fluentcart_misc_countries
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all available countries as value/name pairs. Each entry contains an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code and the country name.

tools.name: fluentcart_misc_country_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific country including states/provinces and address locale configuration.

tools.name: fluentcart_misc_filter_options
tools.description: Retrieve available filter options for advanced filtering on orders, customers, and other entities. Returns field definitions usable in advanced filter queries.

tools.name: fluentcart_misc_form_search_options
tools.description: Retrieve search/autocomplete options for form fields. Returns available options for dynamic form field population.
